insights: Facsimile signatures (2 rejections) are strongest blocklist signal; zero confirmed good listings contain this term.
Gold/metallic printing variants rejected 3× (23kt gold, gold edition, gold foil signature card); authentic confirmed autos avoid these descriptors.
Price mismatches and market discrepancies account for 4/14 rejections (28%); confirmed snipes show steep discounts (81–82% below market).
Title/card mismatch flagged 2/14 rejections; confirmed listings have exact card number/set match to title.
Wrong player/card number errors comprise 4/14 rejections (28%); both confirmed snipes target correct player and valid card.
Novelty/custom/reprint/partial-set language appears in 5 rejections; no confirmed snipes use these terms.
Autograph cards dominate both cohorts (11/14 rejections, 2/2 confirmations); authenticity verification critical.
Confirmed snipes are graded/attributed Ichiro Suzuki autos from 2001–2023 reputable products; rejected autos lack provenance or use suspect language.
